SLOT ingatellentConfigProperties
    INSERT {
    }
END SLOT

AFFECT [[17298303916558156758]]
    TRAVERSE [[254504370080162629]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: ingSwipeLeftForSelectNextDocument
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "ingNextDocument";
                ~&7712927726759444&~: 2 * ~&254549375155946341&~.~&496707965879903317&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(-1, 0)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~ , ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~ )
                ~&233727659172727&~: 4
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&495358363329399331&~: ~&6504391364&~.ingatellentFinishAndOpenNextDocument()
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[11806562588218124596]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT { signal ingatellentFinishAndOpenNextDocument }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[5728643844066569666]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT { onIngatellentFinishAndOpenNextDocument: finishAndOpenNextDocument() }
    END TRAVERSE
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL INSERT {
	property ~&197102514&~ ~&233735394140446&~: ~&233694067165438&~
            function finishAndOpenNextDocument() {
	    	~&5972376&~(!~&254540341572282132&~ || !~&254540341572282132&~.~&7712989590835962&~) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
	    	~&254540341572282132&~.~&254547531013851119&~.~&214622489712&~();
		~&254540341572282132&~.~&254547531013851119&~.~&197079730&~(~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~);
		~&5972376&~(!(~&254540341572282132&~.~&7712989590835962&~ && ~&254540341572282132&~.~&11947836337058337853&~.~&9459159510474675498&~.firstFolderId && ~&254540341572282132&~.~&7712989590835962&~.~&7713151967016225&~(~&254540341572282132&~.~&11947836337058337853&~.~&9459159510474675498&~.firstFolderId))) {
			~&254540341572282132&~.~&11947836337058337853&~.~&9459159510474675498&~.firstFolderId = ~&233735394140446&~.~&4738666142840689386&~(~&254540341572282132&~.~&7712989590835962&~.~&1536661485978992373&~,"Completed");
}

	    	~&254540341572282132&~.~&254547531013851119&~.~&10742505294233143398&~(~&254540341572282132&~.~&11947836337058337853&~.~&9459159510474675498&~.firstFolderId); 
		~&5972376&~(!!~&254540341572282132&~.~&11947836337058337853&~.~&9459159510474675498&~.firstDocumentId && ~&254540341572282132&~.~&11947836337058337853&~.~&9459159510474675498&~.firstDocumentId != ~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~) {
               		~&254540341572282132&~.~&7712989590835962&~.~&6504147419&~(~&254540341572282132&~.~&11947836337058337853&~.~&9459159510474675498&~.firstDocumentId);
		} ~&6503784146&~ {
			~&6504254477&~.~&214622501183&~()	
		}
		
		
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[8850026134298937527]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL INSERT {property ~&214620122227&~ ~&11947836337058337853&~: ~&11947836337058337853&~ }
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
